name: @caisse/pos-desktop
description: POS Caisse — application de caisse desktop
author: AddX Intelligence

scripts.build:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5175 && npm run build:main && electron ."
scripts.desktop:build: POS_TARGET=desktop vite build && npm run build:main && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.desktop:build:win: POS_TARGET=desktop vite build && npm run build:main && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.desktop:build:mac: POS_TARGET=desktop vite build && npm run build:main && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.desktop:build:staging:mac: POS_TARGET=desktop VITE_API_URL="${STAGING_API_URL:?set STAGING_API_URL to your staging API base URL}" vite build && npm run build:main && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.desktop:build:staging:win: POS_TARGET=desktop VITE_API_URL="${STAGING_API_URL:?set STAGING_API_URL to your staging API base URL}" vite build && npm run build:main && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5175 && npm run build:main && electron ."
